name: get_equity_positions
description: List open equity positions for a specific brokerage account. Returns symbol, quantity, average cost, and per-position hold breakdowns.

account_number.description: Brokerage account number. Must come from the user or be clearly implied — never default from get_accounts.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor. Omit for the first page; for the next page, pass the cursor query param from the prior response's next URL.
